default_binding.B2_DETAIL3: a friendly little bunny nibbling sweet clover leaves
default_binding.C2_LANDMARK1: a row of tall golden sunflowers

slots.meaning: The child-facing protagonist (an animal in the original theme).
slots.guidance: A single small, gentle creature (name plus kind); curious, never reckless; referenced by name throughout.

slots.meaning: The small, delightful thing the hero follows through the whole story.
slots.guidance: A gentle, roaming creature or object the hero wants to keep in sight; never itself a hazard.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, safe place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: A familiar, enclosed, sunny outdoor space; wonder, not danger; no hazards of any kind.

slots.meaning: The safe home spot a setback ending returns the hero to.
slots.guidance: A cozy, always-reachable resting spot; a setback always ends here, warm and content.

slots.meaning: The first destination named at the opening three-way choice.
slots.guidance: A distinct, inviting patch of the threshold; must read as clearly different from the other two.

slots.meaning: The second destination named at the opening three-way choice.
slots.guidance: Distinct from A and C; a gentle water-adjacent or open feature works well but is not required.

slots.meaning: The third destination named at the opening three-way choice.
slots.guidance: Distinct from A and B; a low, tickly, or overgrown feature works well but is not required.

slots.meaning: The small creature encountered on route A that can distract the hero from the goal.
slots.guidance: A harmless, charming small creature; the distraction is gentle, never scary.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the hero stayed with the A1_LURE and the goal wandered off (setback).
slots.guidance: A warm, gentle setback title naming the distraction; the ending must still feel content, not sad.

slots.meaning: The first landmark passed on route A's continuing path.
slots.guidance: A small, safe, pleasant garden feature.

slots.meaning: The small creature met at A2_LANDMARK.
slots.guidance: A harmless, cheerful small animal; purely decorative wonder, not a choice point.

slots.meaning: The second landmark on route A's continuing path, reached just before the final zone.
slots.guidance: A small, safe, edible or sensory garden feature.

slots.meaning: The cozy nook where route A's final choice happens.
slots.guidance: A soft, safe, intimate little pocket of the garden.

slots.meaning: The small found object in A2_ZONE that leads to the crown ending.
slots.guidance: A tiny, safe, wearable or carryable garden trinket.

slots.meaning: The single body-part word used in the 'On {HERO}'s ___' ending title (nose ending).
slots.guidance: A single gentle, huggable body-part word appropriate to the hero's kind; used both in prose and in the ending title.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the crown/keepsake success ending on route A.
slots.guidance: A warm, positive title naming a small keepsake the hero keeps.

slots.meaning: The small creature encountered on route B that can distract the hero from the goal.
slots.guidance: A harmless, playful small creature; the distraction is a fun game, never scary.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the hero played with the B1_LURE and the goal wandered off (setback).
slots.guidance: A playful, gentle setback title; the ending must still feel content, not sad.

slots.meaning: The first landmark on route B's continuing path.
slots.guidance: A gentle, plant-like or water-adjacent garden feature that is safe to walk near.

slots.meaning: A small, wondrous creature glimpsed at B2_LANDMARK1.
slots.guidance: A harmless, quick, sparkly small creature; pure wonder, not a choice point.

slots.meaning: The second landmark on route B's continuing path.
slots.guidance: A soft, low garden feature that gives a small animal shelter.

slots.meaning: The small sleeping creature found at B2_LANDMARK2.
slots.guidance: A harmless, dozing small animal the hero is careful not to wake.

slots.meaning: The sheltered corner where the hero meets the new friend.
slots.guidance: A cozy, shaded, safe little pocket of the garden.

slots.meaning: The name of the new friend the hero meets on route B.
slots.guidance: A single friendly small-animal name; used consistently for every reference to this character.

slots.meaning: A short description of the new friend and what they are doing when first met.
slots.guidance: A gentle, kid-relatable small-animal descriptor plus a harmless activity (e.g. eating a snack).

slots.meaning: The small snack the hero and new friend share in the ending.
slots.guidance: A safe, garden-grown treat.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the shared-snack, new-friendship success ending on route B.
slots.guidance: A warm, positive title naming the shared treat or the new friendship.

slots.meaning: The boundary feature the goal escapes over in route C's setback ending.
slots.guidance: A safe, ordinary boundary feature of the threshold; the goal escapes over/past it, no harm implied.

slots.meaning: The first landmark on route C's continuing (tiptoe) path.
slots.guidance: A tall, gentle row of plants the hero passes beneath.

slots.meaning: The small threshold feature the goal slips through on route C.
slots.guidance: A small, safe, passable garden boundary feature (never locked, never dangerous).

slots.meaning: The quiet flowering corner beyond C2_LANDMARK2.
slots.guidance: A calm, safe, secluded flower-filled pocket of the garden.

slots.meaning: The single overhead garden feature where the final ending happens.
slots.guidance: A single bare noun for a small overhead garden structure the hero can sit beneath.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the calm, restful success ending on route C.
slots.guidance: A warm, positive title naming the resting spot from C2_LANDMARK3.
